name: sql优化_main_execute_workflow_部门账号联系人通知_单链路SSH拉仓库CSV版

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "qwen3.7-plus", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "严格根据输入提示完成分析，并且只输出 JSON。不要输出 Markdown，不要输出额外解释。" }, { "role": "user", "content": $json.prompt || "" } ], "stream": false } }}

parameters.query:
select email, userId, user
from employee
where (
  lower(coalesce(userId, '')) in (
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.executor }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.executor }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')
  )
  or lower(coalesce(user, '')) in (
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.executor }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.executor }}'),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'))
  )
  or lower(substring_index(coalesce(email, ''), '@', 1)) in (
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')
  )
)
and email is not null
and trim(email) <> ''

parameters.jsCode:
const base = $('Build Langfuse Batch').first().json || {};
const notify = $json || {};
let langfuse = { skipped: true, reason: base.langfuseSkipReason || '' };
try {
  const node = $('Write Langfuse').first();
  langfuse = node && node.json ? node.json : langfuse;
} catch (error) {
  langfuse = { skipped: true, reason: String(error && error.message ? error.message : error) };
}
const aiResult = base.aiResult || {};
const evidenceAlert = (base.evidence || {}).alert || {};
const textOf = (value) => value === null || value === undefined ? '' : String(value);
const backendSuggestionText = '异常查询：\n'
  + '- 集群：' + textOf(base.cluster) + '\n'
  + '- 优化后sql的详细地址：http://sr-admin.kuainiujinke.com/share/sql/' + textOf(base.queryId) + '\n'
  + '- CPU时间：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.cpuTime) + '\n'
  + '- 内存使用：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.memUsage) + '\n'
  + '- 执行时间：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.execTime) + '\n'
  + '- 扫描行数：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.scanRows) + '\n'
  + '- 用户：' + textOf(base.user) + '\n\n'
  + '告警原因：\n'
  + '- ' + textOf(evidenceAlert.violationDetail) + '\n\n'
  + 'AI结论：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.oneLineConclusion) + '\n\n'
  + '核心问题：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.coreIssue) + '\n\n'
  + '优化建议：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.summary) + '\n\n'
  + '优化后SQL：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.optimizedSql) + '\n\n'
  + '优化风险点：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.risk) + '\n\n'
  + '需人工验证：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.validationAdvice) + '\n\n'
  + '如果需要人工协助，请联系：\n'
  + textOf(base.countryOwnerNamesText);
return [{ json: {
  ok: true,
  sessionId: base.sessionId || '',
  queryId: base.queryId || '',
  cluster: base.cluster || '',
  user: base.user || '',
  executor: base.executor || '',
  result: aiResult || {},
  notifyEmail: textOf(base.notifyEmail || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group') || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group',
  notifyEmails: Array.isArray(base.notifyEmails) && base.notifyEmails.length ? base.notifyEmails : [textOf(base.notifyEmail || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group') || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group'],
  countryOwnerEmails: base.countryOwnerEmails || [],
  countryOwnerNames: base.countryOwnerNames || [],
  countryOwnerNamesText: textOf(base.countryOwnerNamesText),
  userInfo: base.userInfo || [],
  duplicateNotifySuppressed: !!base.duplicateNotifySuppressed,
  duplicateNotifyReason: base.duplicateNotifyReason || '',
  notifyResponse: notify,
  langfuse: {
    traceId: base.langfuseTraceId || '',
    generationId: base.langfuseGenerationId || '',
    generationIds: base.langfuseGenerationIds || [],
    traceName: base.langfuseTraceName || '',
    generationName: base.langfuseGenerationName || '',
    usage: base.langfuseUsage || { prompt_tokens: 0, completion_tokens: 0, total_tokens: 0 },
    attempts: base.langfuseAttempts || [],
    attemptCount: Number(base.langfuseAttemptCount || 0),
    accepted: !!langfuse && !langfuse.skipped,
    skipped: !!langfuse.skipped,
    response: langfuse
  },
  evidence: base.evidence || {},
  prompt: base.prompt || '',
  aiRawOutput: base.aiRawOutput || '',
  optimizedExplainChecked: !!base.optimizedExplainChecked,
  optimizedExplainOk: !!base.optimizedExplainOk,
  optimizedExplainPermissionDenied: !!base.optimizedExplainPermissionDenied,
  optimizedExplainError: base.optimizedExplainError || '',
  optimizedExplainSummary: base.optimizedExplainSummary || '',
  optimizedExplainRows: base.optimizedExplainRows || [],
  backendSuggestionText
}}];

parameters.content: Import the skill workflow first, then open Execute Skill Prep and reselect the imported workflow manually. Qwen API key has already been filled in Call Qwen Chat API.

parameters.command:
=ssh root@10.20.84.176 "set -e
REPO=/root/KN-YCGJ-TZ
CSV=\$REPO/alert-sql-notification/data/alert-contact-mapping.csv
if [ -d \"\$REPO/.git\" ]; then
  cd \"\$REPO\"
  git fetch origin main >/dev/null 2>&1
  git reset --hard origin/main >/dev/null 2>&1
else
  rm -rf \"\$REPO\"
  git clone git@github.com:chenjiuxuan1/KN-YCGJ-TZ.git \"\$REPO\" >/dev/null 2>&1
fi
cat \"\$CSV\"
"

nodes.name: Fetch Contact CSV
nodes.notes: SSH 到能访问 GitHub 的机器，拉取 KN-YCGJ-TZ 最新代码后 cat 出联系人 CSV。若目标机器不是 10.20.84.176，请只改 command 里的 ssh 地址。
